priority_region.label: Central Europe
priority_region.notes: M20 second-era CE geometry. Austrian Empire / Hungarian lands / post-partition Polish residual readability for the Victoria-leaning 1836 start.

source_notes: Curator-authored soft frontier bands and sample hard overrides for M20 multi-region period geometry.
Not derived from proprietary game maps.
Hard overrides target sample_* CE province IDs; they skip cleanly on full Natural Earth builds.
Soft boundary hints are geographic and apply on any scaffold that intersects the priority region.
do_not_claim: Paradox-grade Austrian Empire / German Confederation microborders
legal 1836 frontiers — hints are illustrative for the historical sniff test

boundary_hints.label: Austrian Empire core band
boundary_hints.notes: Soft band around the Vienna basin and Alpine fringe for Metternich-era readability.

boundary_hints.label: Galician corridor band
boundary_hints.notes: Illustrative band for Austrian Galicia / partition-era Polish lands story.

boundary_hints.label: Hungarian lands under Habsburg
boundary_hints.notes: Soft band for Kingdom of Hungary within the Austrian Empire frame.

boundary_hints.label: Bohemian crownland band
boundary_hints.notes: Soft band for Bohemia as Austrian crownland (not independent CZE).

hard_overrides.reason: Austrian Empire capital readability; modest footprint nudge on the CE sample.
Bohemia retained as scaffold shape; crownland story via soft band + politics.
Mazovia retained; Congress Poland / partition story via politics + Galicia band.
Hungarian plain retained; lands-under-Habsburg story via soft frontier.
